=✅ *Posted to Instagram!*

🖼 *Pinterest:*
`{{ $('Code: Prepare Sheet Update').first().json.pinterest_url }}`

📸 *Instagram Post ID:*
`{{ $('Code: Prepare Sheet Update').first().json.instagram_post_id }}`

🕐 {{ $('Code: Prepare Sheet Update').first().json.posted_date }}

🔴 Node: `{{ $json.failed_node }}`

🕐 {{ $json.time }}

To retry: change row Status back to PENDING in Google Sheet.
